title: Content SMP member plushies
description: a very simple mod that ads 14 csmp members as marketable plushies/statues for your house
body:
Hello, this is my first ever mod.
this mod adds 14 of the content smp members as marketable plushies/statues.

in no perticular order we have:
1. Diansu
2. Noxintrus
3. Luxintrus
4. Doctor4t
5. folly (the admin acc)
6. Talon_MC
7. winsweep
8. eight-sided square
9. Moriya
10. arathain
11. astron
12. asai
13. sillvia
14. will_bl
    
![all the current pll added](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/611a44a04cc097a87d9888704ff771fe7ef0a157.png)

i hope you enjoy having theese silly guys around your base


(made using mcreator)
